items.definition_en: A trowel is a small tool used for digging in the garden.
items.example_en: She planted the seeds with a trowel.

items.definition_en: A hoe is a tool for breaking up soil and removing weeds.
items.example_en: He used a hoe to clear the weeds.

items.definition_en: A pruner is a tool for cutting branches and plants.
items.example_en: She used a pruner to trim the rose bush.

items.definition_en: Garden shears are large scissors for cutting plants.
items.example_en: He cut the hedge with garden shears.

items.definition_en: A dibber is a stick for making holes in the soil for seeds.
items.example_en: She made holes for seeds with a dibber.

items.definition_en: A watering gun is a nozzle for spraying water on plants.
items.example_en: He watered the flowers with a watering gun.

items.definition_en: A garden cart is a cart for carrying tools and soil in the garden.
items.example_en: We moved the soil using a garden cart.

items.definition_en: A plant pot is a container used to grow plants.
items.example_en: The new plant sits in a plant pot on the patio.

items.definition_en: A seed tray is a flat container for growing seeds.
items.example_en: We started the seeds in a seed tray.

items.definition_en: Garden string is string used for tying plants or marking rows.
items.example_en: She tied the tomato plants with garden string.

items.definition_en: A weeder is a tool for removing weeds from soil.
items.example_en: He used a weeder to pull out dandelions.

items.definition_en: An edger is a tool for making clean edges in a garden.
items.example_en: She used an edger to tidy the lawn border.

items.definition_en: A watering wand is a long tool for watering plants easily.
items.example_en: He watered the hanging plants with a watering wand.

items.definition_en: A garden knife is a sharp tool for cutting plants or roots.
items.example_en: She cut the roots with a garden knife.

items.definition_en: Loppers are large scissors for cutting thick branches.
items.example_en: He trimmed the tree with loppers.

items.definition_en: A cultivator is a tool for loosening and turning soil.
items.example_en: She used a cultivator to prepare the garden bed.

items.definition_en: A garden net is a net for protecting plants from birds or animals.
items.example_en: They covered the strawberries with a garden net.

items.definition_en: A spray bottle is a bottle used for spraying water or chemicals.
items.example_en: She misted the leaves with a spray bottle.

items.definition_en: A garden roller is a heavy tool used to flatten soil or grass.
items.example_en: He rolled the lawn with a garden roller.

items.definition_en: A garden bench is a seat placed in a garden.
items.example_en: They rested on the garden bench after working.
